overview: This is the Shoren-in Temple, a historic Tendai sect temple in Kyoto, Japan. The large trees prominent in the scene are centuries-old camphor trees (kusunoki). The temple is also known as "Awata Palace" due to its history as a residence for imperial family members serving as head priests. www.japan365days.com +3 4 sites 青蓮院門跡へ : むつずかん May 24, 2017 — 青蓮院門跡へ : むつずかん. ログイン. むつずかん. 新しい記事. 青蓮院門跡へ. 2017-05-24 14:39. 友達３人で. 新緑を楽しみたいということで、. 私の好きなエリア、岡崎に！. ... 車で前を通るたび、目がうばわれてしまう、. 大きな...
